videoSnippet.title: Single Square Makes All the Difference
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator 
Lotus Chess April Arena https://lichess.org/tournament/nT0JRnZV
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/
https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments

Fedoseev, Vladimir (2708) - Moranda, Wojciech (2542)
SBL München (https://lichess.org/broadcast/german-bundesliga-202526/round-8/Bdt8QSfZ/1T248y3b) [8.1] B23 2026.01.10
B23 Sicilian, closed

1.e4 c5 2.Nc3 d6 3.f4 Nc6 4.Bb5 Bd7 5.Nf3 g6 6.Bc4 Bg7 7.d3 Nd4 8.Nxd4 cxd4 9.Ne2 e6 10.O-O Ne7 11.Bb3 O-O 12.Bd2 a5 13.a4 Kh8 14.Kh1 f5 15.Ng1 fxe4 16.dxe4 d5 17.Qe1 Bc6 18.e5 Nf5 19.Rf3 g5 20.Ne2 Qc7 21.Rh3 gxf4 22.Nxf4 Qf7 23.Qe2 Bh6 24.Rf1 $6 { Inaccuracy. Nh5 was best. } 24...Bxf4 25.Rxf4 Rg8 26.g4 Qg6 27.Rd3 Rg7 28.Qf2 Rag8 29.h4 Ne3 30.Rdxd4 Nf5 31.h5 Qe8 $4 { Blunder. Qf7 was best. } 32.gxf5 Qxh5+ 33.Rh4 Qxf5 34.Be3 Rg1+ $6 { Inaccuracy. Qxe5 was best. } 35.Qxg1 Qf3+ 36.Kh2 Rxg1 37.Bxg1 Qe2+ 38.Kg3 Qxe5+ $6 { Inaccuracy. Be8 was best. } 39.Rdf4 Qd6 $6 { Inaccuracy. Qb8 was best. } 40.Rh5 Be8 $6 { Inaccuracy. h6 was best. } 41.Bd4+ Kg8 42.Rg5+ Bg6 43.c3 Qd8 44.Rf6 Qd6+ 45.Kg2 Qa6 46.Bxd5
